summary: Recording quality unknown; the show is celebrated for an unexpected Box of Rain finale that fans rank highly.
review: Listeners focus on the surprise inclusion of Box of Rain at the end of the first set, calling it a highlight and even ranking the performance high because of it. No audio‑quality details are provided, so the recording’s technical merit remains unclear, but the musical moment itself is clearly beloved by those who attended.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about the Box of Rain performance (show quality) offset by lack of recording details and a single negative review; overall rating reflects a good show with unknown audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not mention sound clarity, mix, or source type, so technical quality cannot be assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight the end‑of‑first‑set decision to play Box of Rain as a surprise climax that earned high marks, despite some confusion about whether it was performed at the referenced 10‑6‑84 Richmond show.

band_member_comments.Phil: Backstage comment thanking Phil for Box of Rain; he replied "I guess it was worth it then".
